'''hawotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecilian|cecilian]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecilian|cecilian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hawotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæwetheth|hæwetheth]] || [[word:hæwethej|hæwethej]] || [[word:hæwethesh|hæwethesh]] || [[word:hæwethe|hæwethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hawowothoth|hawowothoth]] || [[word:hawowothoj|hawowothoj]] || [[word:hawowothosh|hawowothosh]] || [[word:hawowotho|hawowotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hawothoth|hawothoth]] || [[word:hawothoj|hawothoj]] || [[word:hawothosh|hawothosh]] || [[word:hawotho|hawotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hawofthoth|hawofthoth]] || [[word:hawofthoj|hawofthoj]] || [[word:hawofthosh|hawofthosh]] || [[word:hawofthof|hawofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hawothotho|hawothotho]] || [[word:hawothojo|hawothojo]] || [[word:hawothosho|hawothosho]] || [[word:hawothoko|hawothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hawothoth|hawothoth]] || [[word:hawothoj|hawothoj]] || [[word:hawothosh|hawothosh]] || [[word:hawotho|hawotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hawothothol|hawothothol]] || [[word:hawothojol|hawothojol]] || [[word:hawothoshol|hawothoshol]] || [[word:hawothokol|hawothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hawothothotho|hawothothotho]] || [[word:hawothojojo|hawothojojo]] || [[word:hawothoshosho|hawothoshosho]] || [[word:hawothoko|hawothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hawothothon|hawothothon]] || [[word:hawothojon|hawothojon]] || [[word:hawothoshon|hawothoshon]] || [[word:hawothokon|hawothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hawothothoro|hawothothoro]] || [[word:hawothojoro|hawothojoro]] || [[word:hawothoshoro|hawothoshoro]] || [[word:hawothokoro|hawothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
